docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,000.00 FILED BY HUI, SHUH NING AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, VERNON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUI, SHUH NING AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, VERNON
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL 12/26/25. CLAIM AND ORDER MAILED TO VERNON WILLIAMS RETURN TO SENDER, UNCLAIMED, UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-02-2026 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SHUH NING HUI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VERNON WILLIAMS IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE PROOF OF SERVICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-13-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SHU NING HUI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VERNON WILLIAMS IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
